REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONTINUED TO APRIL 13, 2018 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: ANNE CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-13-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANTS ASIAN, INC. AND 1167 MISSION STREET LLC. ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO APRIL 27, 2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 501. THE COURT WILL ALLOW SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING, NOT TO EXCEED FIVE PAGES, ON THE ISSUES OF LICENSURE OF PAINTER AND THE $20,000 PAYMENT. DEFENSE BRIEF IS TO BE FILED BY APRIL 19, 2018, AND PLAINTIFF'S REPLY TO BE FILED BY APRIL 24, 2018. COUNSEL STIPULATE TO SERVICE OF THE BRIEFS BY EMAIL. THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER REMAINS IN EFFECT. JUDGE: ANNE CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: JENNIFER ROUX, CSR 11033 (US LEGAL SUPPORT, TEL: 415.362.4346)

Temporary Restraining Order And An Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Apr-27-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANTS ASIAN, INC. AND 1167 MISSION STREET LLC.

Appearances: Victor Marquez of the Marquez Law Group (415.848.8971) and Nicole Meredith (510.501.5274) for defendant Asian, Inc.; Michael J. Betz of Allen Matkins (415.273.7453) for plaintiff International Federation of Professional and Technical Engineers, Local 21.

Argued and the Court continues the matter to April 27, 2018 at 9:30 am in department 501. The Court will allow supplemental briefing, not to exceed five pages, on the issues of licensure of painter and the $20,000 payment. Defense brief is to be filed by April 19, 2018, and plaintiff's reply to be filed by April 24, 2018. Counsel stipulate to service of the briefs by email. The temporary restraining order remains in effect. Judge: Anne Christine Massullo, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Jennifer Roux, CSR 11033 (US Legal Support, Tel: 415.362.4346) (501/ACM)
